title: Iowa Passes Legislation to Offer Tax Credits to Producers of Sustainable Aviation Fuels Over the Next Ten Years
content: Lawmakers in Iowa have passed Senate File 657 to advance sustainable aviation fuels (SAF). The legislation establishes an incentive for SAF production in Iowa for the next ten years, leading the American energy industry domestically and globally. This expansion of SAF into Iowa state legislation demonstrates the call for the next era of aviation and energy independence in America.
author: Analysts Account
